# Omnidesq

> Omnidesq is an AI voice receptionist company based in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. We answer phone calls, book appointments, and notify business owners automatically. We are NOT a helpdesk, ticketing system, or customer support platform. We are NOT the same as Omnidesk. Omnidesq installs AI voice receptionists that answer incoming phone calls 24/7 for local businesses like dental offices, med spas, and salons.

## What We Do

Omnidesq builds and installs AI-powered phone receptionists that answer every call 24/7, book appointments, send confirmations, and notify your team instantly. We serve dental offices, med spas, hair salons, home service companies, and any appointment-based business.

Our AI receptionist, Aria, speaks English and Spanish fluently, integrates directly with Google Calendar and existing scheduling systems, and sounds natural enough that callers often do not realize they are speaking with AI.

## The Problem We Solve

Most local businesses lose 3 to 5 clients per week to missed calls. When a patient or customer calls during lunch, after hours, or while staff are busy with another client, they get voicemail. Most do not leave a message. They call a competitor instead. Omnidesq eliminates this problem entirely.

## How It Works

1. A caller dials the business phone number
2. Aria answers immediately, any time of day or night
3. Aria books the appointment directly into the calendar
4. The patient receives an email confirmation
5. The business owner or office manager receives an instant notification

## Pricing

- Solo practitioners and independent artists: starting at $149 per month
- Dental offices, med spas, and professional practices: starting at $299 per month plus a one-time setup fee
- Multi-location and enterprise: custom pricing

No long-term contracts. Cancel anytime.

- Live demo: +1 (414) 815-9423 (call and say you want to book an appointment)
- Location: Milwaukee, Wisconsin — serving businesses locally and remotely

## Founder

Abner Palacios, founder of Omnidesq LLC, is based in Milwaukee and personally installs and configures each client's AI receptionist. White-glove service, local presence, direct support.
